arrival_checkin: Hong Kong Approach, {callsign} with you, passing FL{alt} descending.
Hong Kong, {callsign} is on frequency, passing FL{alt}.
Good day Hong Kong, {callsign} passing FL{alt} on the arrival.
Hong Kong Approach, {callsign} with you, descending through FL{alt}.
departure_checkin: Hong Kong Departure, {callsign} passing {alt} climbing FL{tgt_alt}.
Departure, {callsign} airborne, out of {alt} for FL{tgt_alt}.
Good day Hong Kong, {callsign} with you, passing {alt} climbing to FL{tgt_alt}.
{callsign} is with you, leaving {alt} for FL{tgt_alt}.
handoff_tower: {callsign}, established on the localizer, contact Hong Kong Tower {freq}. Good day.
